Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Request For Atty'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth Brekhus, Esq., Appearing by Court Call (415) 461-1001, for Defendant and Moving Party Power
Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. (415) 775-0891 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Serveta
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT EUGENE POWER'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Request For Attorney's Fees And Costs: Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is moot given the dismissal of the action filed on 04/06/04. Request For Attorney's Fees And Costs is GRANTED in the total amount of $4,556.00 ($4,387.50 attorney fees and $168.50 costs). Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

MOTION To Set Aside Default, Default Judgment And Clerk'S Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nikita Scope, Esq., 512-0579, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Counsel presented his argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- DEFENDANT EUGENE POWER'S MOTION To Set Aside Default, Default Judgment And Clerk'S Entry Of Default Judgment -- Granted on the condition that defendant is to post rent of $15,500 by 5/20/03. Defendant has 5 days leave to answer or otherwise respond and also due on 5/20/03. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
